sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ الْأَخْبَارَ عَبْرَ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi mladi ljudi čitaju vijesti putem digitalnih aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: Many young people read news through digital applications.

sentences.arabic: تَنْتَشِرُ الْأَخْبَارُ الْعَاجِلَةُ بِسُرْعَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Hitne vijesti se šire veoma brzo svuda.
sentences.translationEn: Breaking news spreads very quickly everywhere.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الضَّرُورِيِّ التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ مَصْدَرِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ نَشْرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je provjeriti izvor vijesti prije njenog objavljivanja.
sentences.translationEn: It is necessary to verify the source of the news before publishing it.
